sentences.target: Ich will das WLAN im Café nutzen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl das ˈveːlaːn ɪm kaˈfeː ˈnʊtsn̩/

translations.de: Ich will das WLAN im Café nutzen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl das ˈveːlaːn ɪm kaˈfeː ˈnʊtsn̩/
translations.en: I want to use the Wi-Fi at the café.
translations.es: Quiero usar el wifi del café.
translations.fr: Je veux utiliser le Wi‑Fi du café.
translations.it: Voglio usare il Wi‑Fi del bar.
translations.ru: Я хочу пользоваться Wi‑Fi в кафе.
translations.pt: Quero usar o Wi‑Fi do café.
translations.he: אני רוצה להשתמש ב‑Wi‑Fi בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn dùng Wi‑Fi ở quán cà phê.
translations.ar: أريد استخدام الواي فاي في المقهى.
translations.nl: Ik wil de wifi in het café gebruiken.
translations.uk: Я хочу користуватися Wi‑Fi в кафе.
translations.hi: मैं कैफ़े का वाई‑फाई इस्तेमाल करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę korzystać z Wi‑Fi w kawiarni.
translations.el: Θέλω να χρησιμοποιήσω το Wi‑Fi στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Jeg vil bruke Wi‑Fi på kaféen.
translations.id: Saya mau pakai Wi‑Fi di kafe.
translations.sv: Jag vill använda wifi på kaféet.
translations.ro: Vreau să folosesc Wi‑Fi‑ul de la cafenea.
translations.da: Jeg vil bruge wifi på caféen.
translations.ja: カフェのWi‑Fiを使いたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 1st person singular; selects the infinitive 'nutzen'.
Definite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of the direct object 'WLAN'.
Common noun, neuter; head of the accusative noun phrase (direct object).
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem') governing dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' (location adjunct).
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'will'.

sentences.target: Er kann das Angebot gut nutzen.

translations.de: Er kann das Angebot gut nutzen.
translations.en: He can make good use of the offer.
translations.ko: 그는 그 할인을 잘 활용할 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他可以好好利用这个优惠。
translations.yue: 佢可以好好利用呢個優惠。
translations.pt: Ele pode aproveitar bem a oferta.
translations.he: הוא יכול לנצל היטב את המבצע.
translations.vi: Anh ấy có thể tận dụng tốt khuyến mãi này.
translations.nl: Hij kan goed gebruikmaken van de aanbieding.
translations.uk: Він може добре скористатися цією акцією.
translations.hu: Jól ki tudja használni az akciót.
translations.hi: वह इस ऑफ़र का अच्छी तरह फायदा उठा सकता है.
translations.pl: Może dobrze skorzystać z tej oferty.
translations.nb: Han kan benytte seg godt av tilbudet.
translations.id: Dia bisa memanfaatkan promo itu dengan baik.
translations.ja: 彼はこのセールをうまく活用できます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; selects the infinitive 'nutzen' (ability).
Definite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Angebot'.
Common noun, neuter; head of the accusative noun phrase (direct object).
Adverb of manner modifying 'nutzen'.
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'kann'.

sentences.target: Sie möchte ihre Zeit am Wochenende nutzen.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈmœçtə ˈiːʁə tsaɪ̯t am ˈvɔxənˌɛndə ˈnʊtsn̩/

translations.de: Sie möchte ihre Zeit am Wochenende nutzen.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈmœçtə ˈiːʁə tsaɪ̯t am ˈvɔxənˌɛndə ˈnʊtsn̩/
translations.en: She wants to use her time on the weekend.
translations.es: Quiere aprovechar bien el fin de semana.
translations.fr: Elle veut profiter de son week‑end.
translations.ko: 주말 시간을 잘 활용하고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她想把周末的时间用好。
translations.yue: 佢想好好運用佢嘅周末時間。
translations.ru: Она хочет хорошо распорядиться временем на выходных.
translations.pt: Ela quer aproveitar bem o fim de semana.
translations.he: היא רוצה לנצל היטב את הזמן בסוף השבוע.
translations.tr: Hafta sonu zamanını iyi değerlendirmek istiyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn tận dụng thời gian cuối tuần thật tốt.
translations.ar: هي تريد أن تستغل وقتها في عطلة نهاية الأسبوع جيدًا.
translations.nl: Ze wil haar tijd in het weekend goed benutten.
translations.uk: Вона хоче добре використати свій час на вихідних.
translations.hu: Szeretné jól kihasználni az idejét a hétvégén.
translations.hi: वह सप्ताहांत में अपना समय अच्छी तरह इस्तेमाल करना चाहती है.
translations.pl: Chce dobrze wykorzystać swój czas w weekend.
translations.el: Θέλει να αξιοποιήσει καλά τον χρόνο της το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.nb: Hun vil bruke helgen sin godt.
translations.id: Dia ingin memanfaatkan waktunya di akhir pekan dengan baik.
translations.sv: Hon vill använda helgen på ett bra sätt.
translations.ro: Vrea să își folosească bine timpul în weekend.
translations.cs: Chce dobře využít svůj čas o víkendu.
translations.da: Hun vil udnytte sin tid i weekenden godt.
translations.ja: 週末の時間をうまく使いたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II form used for desire), 3rd person singular; selects the infinitive 'nutzen'.
Possessive determiner agreeing with feminine singular accusative noun; modifies 'Zeit'.
Common noun, feminine; head of the accusative noun phrase (direct object).
Preposition (contraction of 'an dem') governing dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Common noun, neuter dative singular; object of 'am' (temporal adjunct).
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'möchte'.

sentences.target: Wir wollen die freien Plätze sinnvoll nutzen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən diː ˈfʁaɪ̯ən ˈplɛtsə ˈzɪnfoːl ˈnʊtsn̩/

translations.de: Wir wollen die freien Plätze sinnvoll nutzen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən diː ˈfʁaɪ̯ən ˈplɛtsə ˈzɪnfoːl ˈnʊtsn̩/
translations.en: We want to use the free seats wisely.
translations.es: Queremos aprovechar bien los asientos libres.
translations.fr: Nous voulons utiliser au mieux les places libres.
translations.it: Vogliamo sfruttare al meglio i posti liberi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想把空座位合理利用起来。
translations.ru: Мы хотим разумно использовать свободные места.
translations.pt: Queremos aproveitar bem os lugares livres.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים לנצל היטב את המקומות הפנויים.
translations.tr: Boş koltukları en iyi şekilde kullanmak istiyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn tận dụng hợp lý những chỗ ngồi trống.
translations.ar: نريد استخدام المقاعد الفارغة بشكل حكيم.
translations.nl: We willen de vrije zitplaatsen verstandig gebruiken.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо раціонально використати вільні місця.
translations.hu: Ésszerűen szeretnénk kihasználni a szabad helyeket.
translations.hi: हम खाली सीटों का समझदारी से इस्तेमाल करना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να αξιοποιήσουμε σωστά τις ελεύθερες θέσεις.
translations.nb: Vi vil bruke de ledige plassene på en fornuftig måte.
translations.id: Kami ingin memanfaatkan kursi kosong dengan bijak.
translations.sv: Vi vill använda de lediga platserna på ett klokt sätt.
translations.ro: Vrem să folosim eficient locurile libere.
translations.da: Vi vil udnytte de ledige pladser på en fornuftig måde.
translations.ja: 空いている席をうまく活用したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 1st person plural; selects the infinitive 'nutzen'.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of 'Plätze' (direct object).
Attributive adjective, accusative plural with definite article; modifies 'Plätze'.
Common noun, masculine accusative plural; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Adverbial modifier (adjectival form used adverbially) expressing manner of 'nutzen'.
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'wollen'.
